LanguageData.FCP_Meme_YearOfTheDragon.description: The Year of the Dragon ideology values national unity, collective effort, and technological progress. It encourages loyalty to the state, respect for tradition, and pride in cultural heritage. Citizens are expected to work together for the good of the nation, maintain social harmony, and embrace innovation, believing that unity and determination will bring prosperity and strength.
LanguageData.FCP_Meme_YearOfTheDragon.label: Year of the Dragon
